S

saveReceipt(String) - Static method in class manager.ReceiptManager
cuva detalje racuna u tekstualni fajl unutar "racuni" foldera.
saveToJson(TransportData, String) - Method in class util.TransportDataGenerator
Saves the generated transport data (country map, stations, and departures) into a JSON file.
setBusStation(String) - Method in class model.Station
Sets the unique identifier for the bus station.
setCity(String) - Method in class model.Station
Sets the name of the city for this station.
setCountryMap(String[][]) - Method in class model.TransportData
Sets the 2D array representing the country map.
setDepartures(List<Departure>) - Method in class model.TransportData
Sets the list of departures.
setDepartureTime(String) - Method in class model.Departure
Sets the scheduled departure time.
setDuration(int) - Method in class model.Departure
Sets the duration of the journey in minutes.
setFrom(String) - Method in class model.Departure
Sets the identifier of the departure station.
setMinTransferTime(int) - Method in class model.Departure
Sets the minimum required transfer time at the destination station in minutes.
setPrice(int) - Method in class model.Departure
Sets the price of the journey.
setStations(List<Station>) - Method in class model.TransportData
Sets the list of stations.
setTo(String) - Method in class model.Departure
Sets the identifier of the arrival station.
setTrainStation(String) - Method in class model.Station
Sets the unique identifier for the train station.
setType(String) - Method in class model.Departure
Sets the type of transportation for this departure.
setWeight(double) - Method in class graph.Edge
 
SimpleJsonParser - Class in util
A simple, custom JSON parser designed to read and interpret JSON strings.
SimpleJsonParser(String) - Constructor for class util.SimpleJsonParser
Constructs a new SimpleJsonParser with the given JSON string.
skipWhitespace() - Method in class util.SimpleJsonParser
Skips any whitespace characters from the current SimpleJsonParser.index position until a non-whitespace character is encountered or the end of the string is reached.
Station - Class in model
Represents a transportation hub within a city, encompassing both a bus station and a train station.
Station() - Constructor for class model.Station
 
stationName - Variable in class graph.Node
 
stations - Variable in class model.TransportData
A list of Station objects, where each object represents a transportation hub (containing both bus and train stations) in a specific city.
